game.title: The Last Stand
game.short_text: Keep it standing!

details.title: The Last Stand
details.description:
Hello everyone!
I'm thrilled to introduce "The Last Stand", my very first game created for the Gamedev.tv GameJam 2024! Participating in this challenge has been an incredible journey, and I'm excited for you to experience what I've created.

In "The Last Stand," your goal is simple yet challenging: balance the little grey Goober so he doesn't fall over. Look at that little guy! He's counting on you to keep him upright.
Note: This version is build to played with a keyboard.
I would be absolutely thrilled if you could share your high score in the comments below! I can't wait to see how well you do and hear about the amazing games you've created as well!

Play now and let's see who can achieve the highest score! 🎮


AB

In The Last Sit, you play as an elderly office worker amidst an unexpected apocalypse. As chaos erupts and colleagues transform into wheelchair-bound zombies, your sole motivation lies in a promise made by the CEO: a long-awaited raise in the event of an apocalypse.

game.title: The Last Sanctuary
game.short_text: Defend your last refuge with the help of an inadequate god

details.title: The Last Sanctuary
details.description:
The Last Sanctuary is a tower defense game with rogue-lite element. Recruit envoys and beseech blessings to defend against endless horde of enemy.
Your god gets stronger with every envoys and blessings, but so do the enemies. Apply appropriate blessings to envoy to make them more effectively fend off the offenders.
There is no gaining lives, so make do carefully.
This is an entry for Gamedev.tv Game Jam 2024.
The updated version is an entry for Post Jam Jam #9.
Control
This game is mostly operable by mouse input.
After recruit an envoy/beseech a blessing, they appear at the bar of lower screen. Drag an envoy to the field to deploy them. Likewise, drag a blessing to an envoy to bestow them power.
ESC: pause/unpause
Hold SPACE + Hold & Drag Lmouse to control the camera
Mouse scroll to zoom in/out
Asset
Most assets were made by me, others are as below:
Boss: https://www.pikpng.com/pngvi/bmbwoo_blue-flame-boss-pixel-art-enemy-png-clipart/

Blessing icons: https://rpgpixel.itch.io/315-fantasy-rpg-iconspixel-art
Tileset art style inspired by theangrysnail.
Envoys and enemies art style inspired by Tiny Rogue.

game.title: Soulbind
game.short_text: Floating sim

details.title: Soulbind
details.description:
Made for the Gamedev.tv Game Jam 2024.
Theme - Last Stand-CONTROLS-WASD or Arrow keys to moveclick to select dialogue optionsspace/click to advance dialogue-STORY-
Soulbind is a reflective game where you navigate the realm of purgatory as a soul on its final adventure. The gameplay is simple: dodge disgruntled spirits while collecting scattered memories that define your existence.
As you gather these memories, you’ll dive into dialogue sequences that let you reflect on your past. Each memory presents a choice: was this moment in your life good or bad? Your decisions shape the narrative and influence the outcome of your journey. There are 3 possible endings.
Explore a world where every decision counts and each memory you collect brings you closer to understanding the essence of your soul. Can you find peace and redemption, or will the playful shadows of your past keep you guessing?

Soulbind—a game that invites you to face your past, enjoy the present, and shape your future.

--------------------------------------------------------------
All art and assets (aside from sound) done by me. This is my first complete game to date! Special thanks to Zora Watters for consulting.
--------------------------------------------------------------

Music - Arthur Vyncke - Uncertainty

game.short_text: A little game for GameDev.tv Game Jam 2024 - theme: "Last Stand"

details.title: Gataria
details.description:
Submission for the GameDev.tv Game Jam 2024 (Theme: "Last Stand")
Complete Gameplay Video (Youtube)
Plot:
In this short platformer, you control a cute cat in pursuit of true love. But beware, other cats are also vying for your love's attention. You must defeat them all and be the last cat standing (yes, it's the Game Jam theme).
Controls:

    
        CommandKeys/Buttons
        MoveArrow Keys, A/D Keys, Left Stick, Directional Pad
        JumpSpacebar, Up Arrow, W Key, Right Mouse Button, A (Xbox Layout)
        AttackShift, Ctrl, Z, Left Mouse Button, X (Xbox Layout)
    

Cat Battles:
You can only attack when on the ground. If your attack is successful, the opponent will be thrown in the direction of the attack. When damaged, the opponent loses one heart. If a cat is out of hearts, each subsequent damage also stuns it for a short time. The objective is to push the rival cat out of the arena.
About the Author:
Hello, my name is Carlos Alberto, I'm Brazilian, and sometimes I use the nickname "StealthC." I've always loved video games, and since childhood, I've dreamed of creating my own games. For now, it's just a hobby, but who knows? Maybe one day I'll create something that people love as much as the games I've cherished throughout my life. If you like (or dislike) this or any of my other projects, please leave a comment! I'm always eager to learn more about what makes games enjoyable.

game.short_text: Shooter Game

details.title: The Last Minutes of Moel Jiller
details.description:
--- The Last Minutes Of Moel Jiller ---
A shooter mini-game with simple mechanics.
The goal of our game is to defend your last stand-point in a zombie apocalypse. Share your best score with us in the comments, and we are happy to hear about any critiques as well.
We have not used premade assets in our project.
-- CONTROLS --
Move between points: W A S D
Shoot: MS LEFT CLICK
Switch Weapon: MS SCROLL WHEEL
-- BASE MECHANICS --
Move between the points to change your position and use the weapons to their best potential!
You must consider each shot, since you have limited ammunition (which regenerates slowly overtime), and another way to get more ammo is to pick up randomly spawned Ammo Crates.
Grenades! - other randomly spawned objects are grenades, which can be useful in two ways: 
1. Move on the point where it is, and it is automatically thrown in the air and explode on contact.
2. Zombies can step on them, and it explodes automatically.
Switch your weapons! Each weapon is unique, try to use them in the correct situation.
-- THANKS --
Lastly, thanks to everyone if you try our game, we have worked hard on it!

game.title: A Day At Sea
game.short_text: A balancing act on the high seas!

details.title: A Day At Sea
details.description:
About
Set sail with Captain Neemo on his cargo vessel, as you transport goods across the high seas. Use your skill and technique to safely deliver all the items on Captain Neemo's list. All in a day's work!

Game objectives
Travel over waves while balancing your cargo. Get your cargo to successfully land on the dock, and it is ticked off your Cargo List. Watch out, the waves get more intense as you go.

If you are finding it too challenging, no sweat! Try the easy mode option to reduce the wave intensity and take you through to the end of the game. Thank you!



Controls
Keyboard: 
A and D to rotate the platform. 
Hold Shift + A and D to rotate in 'ultra' speed! 
Enter to launch boat and return. 
Tab to dismiss the Cargo list.
Gamepad:
Left Stick or LT and RT to rotate the platform. 
If on html, D-pad Left and Right also rotate platform. 
Hold X + Left Stick to rotate in 'ultra' speed! 
A to launch boat, B to return boat. 
RB to dismiss the Cargo list.

Extra Info
Gamepad / Download recommended
Full Playthrough: youtube

After the town of Pleasant View suffers a zombie outbreak, there is only one survivor — Dan the Delivery Man.
Realizing this crisis offers him a unique business opportunity, Dan heads to the local morgue. He fills his delivery van full of brains.

game.title: Space Defender
game.short_text: Space Shooter for GamdevTv Jam 2024

details.title: Space Defender
details.description:
Welcome, brave space adventurers, to "Space Defender"!
In a distant future, humanity teeters on the brink of extinction. The last remnants of our civilization have taken refuge in an isolated space base, fleeing from an implacable armada of alien invaders. These enemy forces, hailing from the far reaches of the universe, have already decimated entire planets and show no mercy.

You are humanity’s last hope, an elite pilot trained to face the most perilous dangers of space. At the helm of your advanced spaceship, you must defend our ultimate stronghold against relentless waves of enemies. Your mission is critical: each defeated enemy releases precious energy. This energy, meticulously collected, is the key to powering our base and generating a devastating EMP wave, our only chance to obliterate the opposing forces in one fell swoop.


Control :
Move with Keyboard (AWSD) or Left Gamepad stick
Aim with mouse or Right Gamepad Stick
Fire with Space or Left Click

Game Play:
Kill enemies and collect their energy.
Then, bring it to the station.
You win when the station is fully charged.

   An asteroid has been spotted in the sky and it is headed towards us. It has been confirmed by our only scientist to be, "Hella huge!" and could wipe out all dinosaurs. Many dinosaurs interviewed seem unconvinced. Some believe it will miss our planet. Others welcome the extra light.
   Extra work will be needed to inform these dinosaurs about the serious impending threat. On a personal note, as a paperboy and amateur journalist, I feel it is my duty to prove to my fellow dinosaurs that we need to do something about the asteroid. I will use the power of the press to strike knowledge into the deniers and maybe we can solve this dangerous issue.
CONTROLS: Arrow Keys or WASD
MOBILE CONTROLS: Movement stick on bottom left of screen.

Updates:v.1.05: Updated the game with new numbers. You could not beat the game with the previous values.
v.1.06: Fixed a bug where the game keeps growling at you...

From The Developer:Thanks for checking out my game. Thanks to my family who put up with me for the past week as I got this game built for GameDev.tv Game Jam 2024.
Please post a comment on any and all criticisms you may have.
This has been a fun project to work on. I brainstormed with my kids on what to build from the theme "The Last Stand" and thought of the asteroid that wipes out the dinosaurs. I doubled down on the theme by incorporating the newsstand. After that, the game Vampire Survivors inspired the rest.
My main goals with this project were: 
To have fun. Work on my programming skills by applying some programming design patterns and SOLID principles.Be better skilled with Unity. 
Unfortunately, I had bigger plans than the time allowed for. Some of those plans were:
More newspaper (weapon) types.More variety in newspaper upgrades (throwing more boomerangs at once).Have the boomerang not exclusively be thrown to the right.More sponsors (permanent upgrades)More dinosaur types (I only have two, the Velociraptor and Triceratops)I wanted to have a towering Brachiosaurus.Also the movements for the dinosaurs would vary so then they don't just clump up.More variety in the clothes the dinosaurs wear.Animations, even simple ones.Variety in news sources.I was considering a time traveler which offers lots of points.In-run power ups.Actually balance all the gameplay.Design something so there's a reason to go explore.Back-end stuff like factories and object pooling.Find a way to optimize all the sprites on the screen so that it can handle more.Save system.Make my own spin on the Vampire Survivors-likes.
I'm bummed I didn't have the time (and skill) to put all this in. I'm hoping to work more on this game post-jam and I'll post a link on this game page if something comes out of this.
Thanks again!

This game has been made for the GameDev.tv game jam 2024.
There is a button in the Main Menu to switch sound on or off.
A Last Stand Story is a simple 2D Shooter where you need to defend a Farm Yard from enemy soldiers for as long as you can.
The story is based on a real event during World War II that was told to my family by a veteran while on holiday in Normandy.
The theme of the game jam was Last Stand, and as such, you will die.  How many enemies will you be able to take with you.
The game has been made for a resolution of 1280 x 800 px and has controller support.
The Web Build has been tested using Chrome through itch.io, and the Windows build has been tested on Windows 11.

Play as Artie the ackie monitor lizard, a retired private investigator in the city of Megacityopolis; a city turned to shambles as a wave of crime flooded its streets thanks to a powerful crime syndicate moving in to the area.
 Artie is the type to keep to his self, but when The Last Stand, the only place that makes coffee the way Artie likes it, becomes the latest victim of violence and vandalism, he sees no choice but to step up... And wipe out the crime syndicate with his own hands--er tail.

 Artie is ready to take his last stand for The Last Stand.
 The things we do for good coffee, right?

details.title: Arrow
details.description:
Hello there, we are so happy to upload our first-ever game(prototype) made for the Game Dev TV Game Jam 2024. 🚨🚨👉👉WebGL Build: https://arrow-v01.netlify.app/👈👈🚨🚨
Controls

AD/Arrow Left, Arrow Right:  to move the characterMouse Move: to point at targetsMouse Click: to shootEscape: for the Pause Menu
Mechanics
 Falling Rocks: Dodge or destroy these rocks to stay alive.
 Health Decrease: Lose hearts over time.
Health Regeneration: Destroying rocks replenishes your health.
Increasing Difficulty: As you score points, the rocks fall faster and your health drains quicker.
About Us
We're five0nine.studio, a passionate duo forging our path in indie game development 🔥🔨. "Arrow" is our first-ever prototype, created for the Game Dev TV Game Jam 2024!

My wife, the talented artist behind the stunning visuals, hand-drew all the beautiful assets you see in the game. As the programmer, I wrestled with the code to bring it all to life and exterminate all the encountered bugs.

We had so much fun creating this small prototype. We'd love for you to play it and share your thoughts! (they will be much appreciated).

Game Lore
Elara, the Last Sentinel. Elara wasn't always a lone warrior defending a crumbling wilderness. She belonged to the Everwood, a thriving elven civilization nestled within ancient mountains. Their lives were attuned to nature, their magic woven from the whispering leaves and the strength of the earth. Disaster struck not in the form of a malicious force, but a natural cataclysm. A monstrous earthquake shook the very foundations of the mountains, toppling trees, splitting rivers, and sending tremors that threatened to tear the Everwood apart. Panic gripped the elves, many fleeing to seek refuge in distant lands. Elara, however, refused to abandon her home. A skilled archer with exceptional focus and unwavering spirit rose as one of their fiercest defenders. Now, she stands alone, the last sentinel of the Everwood. Standing amidst the devastation, she saw not a world ending, but a world reshaping. With unwavering determination, she vowed to become the guardian of the fractured Everwood. Armed with her enchanted bow, "Whisperwind," forged from the last living branch of a special tree, she stands amidst the ruins. Each arrow she unleashes carries the fading magic of the Everwood, a precious resource she must use wisely to defend her home from the encroaching dangers.Download the zip file and extract it in the desired location.

details.title: Last Pin Standing
details.description:
Welcome to Last Pin Standing! Made for the GameDev.TV 2024 Game Jam!
Controls are:W/A/S/D - Select spot to move toSpace Bar - Move to spot / Start GameEscape - Pause Game
You are the last pin standing after the bowling balls attacked. It’s up yo you to avenge your fallen friends and family by remaining up for as long as you can. Jump and dodge as the bowling balls try to knock you down, and get the biggest high score you can!
Playable in Browser and via Windows download. Wasn’t able to add touch controls in time for mobile browser, so will require mouse and keyboard. And for anybody else who reads this, stick around for a while when you get the game over screen for my favorite "glitch turned feature" that I encountered while working on the game! Enjoy!————————————————————————
Thanks so much for checking out my game! This is the 3rd Game Jam I’ve participated in, but it had a lot of firsts for me! This is the first non-VR game I’ve made in a long time, which took more adjusting to than I thought it would. I was also able to add music this time, which I am very happy with.  This is also the first time I've tried building for a WEB player, which isn't too hard (just a setting in Unity), but still a very cool thing to do for the first time. If the player is a little funky though, that's why!
There are plenty of things I wanted to add but either didn’t have enough time to add, or didn’t know enough to justify spending the time learning how to add them. But I think where I got to is good enough! 
I hope you enjoy it!

Help the small coral reef to survive the waves of trash! But worry not! Friends will come and help you in your fight.

game.title: The Key
game.short_text: A fresh take on the classic text adventure game - reimagined and fiendishly puzzling.

details.title: The Key
details.description:
You wake up in a prison cell and have 12 hours to prove your innocence and escape.  The funny thing is, the only way to do it is to lie down.  And dream.
Reminiscent of retro text adventure games, The Key re-imagines the genre by including some very unusual game mechanics and extremely difficult puzzles.
This demo version includes one of several possible endings.
Feel free to leave a comment if you have questions/suggestions or you're stuck on a puzzle.  Hints will happily be provided.  :-)
FONTS:

- Rough Typewriter, by jibbajabbafonts@gmail.com
- Truetypewriter, by Sam_T

- Ministry, by Rian HughesTo play The Key, simply download the zip file and extract it to any folder on your PC.  The zip file includes "TheKey.exe" and two folders:  "TheKey_Data" and "Assets".  Make sure the file and the folders are saved in the same location, and then run the EXE file.

game.title: Pandorus
game.short_text: What will you do in your final hour?

details.title: Pandorus
details.description:
After aeons of existence, the last remnants of life remain at the knife edge  of the universe. All ideas and theories discussed and debated over and over. And yet the universe refuses to give the necessary tools to make every dream a reality?  
 What if some things require too much energy and can never be feasibly built ever? What if the lack of certainty in the smallest entity forever prevents us from finding the needed answers? What if there are some things that are uncomputable by our laws of physics and thus can never be tested and measured in our realm? What if this is all there is in existence and we live in it to the end of time? 
The end draws nearer. What will you do in your final hour?
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Controls
Arrow Keys: Movement
Z: Interact
X: Cancel/Back

game.short_text: The 3 little pigs surviving against the Bad Wolf's horde

details.title: Wolf's Revenge
details.description:
How to play
Select the defenses on menu with mouse;Put your defenses strategicaly on the map;When a defense is selected, you can press Esc or the Mouse Right Button to cancel;Esc pauses the game;

The story so far...
Everyone knows the story of the Three Little Pigs and how they fought, and defeated, the Big Bad Wolf. 
This story is about the Aftermath… 
The deceased wolf’s pack was infuriated by the pigs' actions and swore Revenge. 
Their plan: to come in full force and wipe out the pigs… 
You must prepare for a Last Stand. Help the pigs overcome the fight to end all fairy tale fights, and secure their Happy Ending!
Spend money to lay traps and eliminate the wolves until there is no one left.
Good luck!
